title: UDS broker fans out to topic subscribers
description:
## Intent
As a local developer, I want a UDS broker to fan out publications so local tools can subscribe without MQTT.

## Gherkin
Feature: UDS broker
  Scenario: Fan out by topic
    Given the UDS broker is running
    And a subscriber is registered for "projects/kbs/events"
    When a publisher sends a message to that topic
    Then the subscriber receives the message

## Definition of Done
- UDS broker supports multiple subscribers and publishes to matching topics.
creator: ryan.porter
